STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_BROT: Whenever another player plays a [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold], put your [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] from wherever it is.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SERP: Whenever any player plays a [gold]Snakebite[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever any player plays a [gold]Snakebite[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_TIGE: Whenever you play two consecutive [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold] cards of different types, draw.

Whenever you play two consecutive [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold] cards of different types, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
Last: {TigerFlowLastType:choose(0|1|2|3):—|Attack|Skill|Power}. [blue]{TigerFlowStepsUntilDraw}[/blue] step(s) until trigger.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_CHEC: If you play no [gold]Attack[/gold] by the end of this turn, you take a penalty next turn and the caster gains a benefit next turn.

If you play no [gold]Attack[/gold] by the end of this turn, at the start of next turn you lose {DpsTargetEnergyLoss:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{DpsDrawFewerNextHand}[/blue] fewer card(s); the caster gains {DpsCasterEnergyNextTurn:energyIcons()} and draws [blue]{DpsCasterDrawNextTurn}[/blue] extra card(s).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_BOUN: When killed, the killing player gains [gold]Gold[/gold] from its Max HP (capped).
When this unit is killed, the player who dealt the killing blow gains [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to its Max HP, up to [blue]{BountyGoldCap}[/blue].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_DOUB: Take double damage from [gold]Attacks[/gold] this turn.
This turn, damage you take from [gold]Attacks[/gold] is doubled [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SHAR: Gain [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_HANG: At the start of your next turn, lose all [gold]Energy[/gold], and gain [gold]No Draw[/gold] and [gold]Ringing[/gold] for 1 turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_PER_: This turn, whenever you spend [gold]Energy[/gold], channel random [gold]Orb(s)[/gold].
This turn, whenever you spend [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], channel [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random [gold]Orb(s)[/gold].
